allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Pricing Analysis feature with improved UI visibility

- Add Pricing Analysis tab to Dashboard Builder \(4th tab\)
- Create process-pricing-analysis API route to parse CSV/Excel files
- Add PricingAnalysisView component with bar, line, heatmap, and table views
- Fix getDefaultPricingFilters to correctly read from pricing data structure
- Add pricing-analysis to chart groups configuration
- Update ChartGroupSelector to show Pricing Analysis when data exists
- Fix text visibility in filters and heatmap \(change to black text\)
- Convert Segments from multi-select to dropdown format
- Improve heatmap contrast for better readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
